Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('firebase.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('✓ firebase.json is valid JSON'\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('firestore.indexes.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('✓ firestore.indexes.json is valid JSON'\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const config = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('firebase.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Firebase.json structure:'\); console.log\('- Emulators configured:', Object.keys\(config.emulators\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('- Firestore port:', config.emulators.firestore.port\); console.log\('- Auth port:', config.emulators.auth.port\); console.log\('- UI port:', config.emulators.ui.port\); console.log\('- UI enabled:', config.emulators.ui.enabled\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const indexes = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('firestore.indexes.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Firestore indexes:'\); indexes.indexes.forEach\(\(idx, i\) => { const fields = idx.fields.map\(f => f.fieldPath\).join\(', '\); console.log\('  ' + \(i+1\) + '. Collection:', idx.collectionGroup, '| Fields:', fields\); }\);")
